segment.source: Renders a responsive two- to four-column grid of cards, each holding one metric as a counting value with label plus an optional change figure and up/down trend arrow. Use it for: KPI summaries, quarterly or annual report highlights, dashboard-style figures with period-over-period deltas, performance overviews. Prefer 'KPI Cards' for similar trend tiles, 'Stats Section' for marketing proof numbers without deltas, and 'Sparkline KPI Card' when a mini trend line matters.
